memoryArtifacts.headline: Life Story
memoryArtifacts.description: Bonne of Berry (1367 – 30 December 1435) was a French countess. She was Countess of Savoy by marriage to Amadeus VII, Count of Savoy. When she was widowed, she unsuccessfully claimed the regency durin …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Bonne de Berry於1365年出生在法國貝里時，她的父親Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry25歲，母親Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry19歲。她於1377年6月18日與Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1435年12月30日在法國奧維坎塔爾卡拉特享年70歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bonne de Berry于1365年出生在法国貝里时，她的父亲Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry25岁，母亲Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry19岁。她于1377年6月18日与Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1435年12月30日在法国奧維坎塔爾卡拉特享年70岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Berrey
meanings: English: variant of   Berry  .

variants.name: Barry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Bery
meanings: English: variant of   Berry  .
Hungarian (Béry): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Bér, in Baranya, Komárom, Nógrád, Pest, Vas, or Zala counties.

variants.name: Beery
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Béara. See Berry and O'Berry .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Bieri  .

variants.name: Berrie
meanings: Scottish:
(Glasgow): from Middle English or Older Scots (atte) beri ‘(at the) manor house’, see Berry .
variant   Barrie  .

nameMeanings.name: Bonne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a nickname from Old French bon ‘good’ (Latin bonus). Use as a given name may have been inspired by the legendary U.S. frontiersman Daniel Boone ( 1734–1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Bonne de Berry was born in 1365, in Berry, France, her father, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, was 25 and her mother, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, was 19. She married Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie on 18 June 1377, in Paris, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 30 December 1435, in Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bonne de Berry est née en 1365, à Berry, France, son père, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie le 18 juin 1377, à Paris, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 décembre 1435, à Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bonne de Berry 1365 in Berry, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry 25 und ihre Mutter Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry 19. Sie hat am 18. Juni 1377 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Dezember 1435 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, Frankreich und wurde in Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bonne de Berry è nata il nel 1365 nel Berry, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie il 18 giugno 1377, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 dicembre 1435, nel Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bonne de Berryが1365年にフランスバーリーで生まれた時，父Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berryは25歳，母Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berryは19歳であった。1377年6月18日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスでAmédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1435年12月30日にフランスアウバーグンカンタルカーラトで70歳で死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスエイビーロンロデズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bonne de Berry(이)가 1365년 프랑스 베리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1377년 6월 18일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 12월 30일 프랑스 오버그니 캔탤 칼라트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 에비런 로데즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bonne de Berry nasceu em 1365, em Berry, França, seu pai, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie em 18 de junho de 1377, em Paris, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1435, em Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bonne de Berry родилась в 1365 г. в местности бирри, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie 18 июня 1377 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 декабря 1435 г. в местности карлат, канталь, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности родез, авирон, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bonne de Berry nació en 1365, en Berry, Francia, su papá, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Amédée de SAVOIE VII "le comte Rouge"   Comte de Savoie el 18 de junio de 1377, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1435, en Carlat, Cantal, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Rodez, Aveyron, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
